terminal_claim_scope: Initial first-slice live task-lifecycle setup is claimable: root init, sqlite3 adapter DB mutation, and live descriptor MCP plan tool are verified. Mutating MCP tools remain intentionally not exposed.
no_import_evidence: The source change exposes descriptor-only task lifecycle planning through MCP and imports no narada-andrey runtime/source state. Live smoke returned sourceStateImported=false and packageExecutedSqliteMutation=false.

verification.command: pnpm --dir packages\layers\cli exec vitest run test/commands/mcp-server.test.ts
verification.summary: 1 test file passed; 17 tests passed, including site_task_lifecycle.plan_init listing and handler coverage.
Built CLI dist so node_modules/.bin/narada-mcp uses the new MCP tool binding.
Returned Narada proper task lifecycle paths with mutationAttempted=false, sourceStateImported=false, and packageExecutedSqliteMutation=false.

rollback_notes: Revert the task-0004 package source changes and preserve .narada audit/ledger as superseded evidence. No DB rollback is needed for the MCP binding change.
remaining_blockers: adapter-bound mutating task lifecycle MCP tools are not exposed and require a separate admission if needed
